summary: Universal Click Tracking System - All 13 backend tests PASSED. All 5 customer-facing pages verified to load with cid param. Tracking integration working end-to-end: events logged and appearing in contact activity feed.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/tracking/event properly handles 3 paths: direct contact_id (preferred), phone fallback, and no identifier (returns tracked:false)
ACTION_CONFIG in tracking.py has comprehensive mappings for all 5 pages: card, congrats, review, link_page, store_card
All 5 frontend pages (card/[userId], congrats/[cardId], review/[storeSlug], l/[username], card/store/[storeSlug]) properly import and use trackCustomerAction
All 5 frontend pages extract cid from URL params and pass to tracking calls
Digital card page passes cid to GET /card/data/{userId}?cid=... for accurate page-view attribution
Link page triggers both legacy counter POST and universal tracking for backward compatibility
Review page tracks both review_link_clicked and review_submitted with salesperson attribution via sp param

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 5 customer-facing pages render correctly with cid param

context_for_next_testing_agent: Universal click tracking system fully implemented and tested. Backend POST /api/tracking/event endpoint works with contact_id (preferred) and phone fallback. All 5 customer-facing pages wired: /card/{userId}, /congrats/{cardId}, /review/{storeSlug}, /l/{username}, /card/store/{storeSlug}. The cid URL param is read on all pages and passed to tracking calls. Events appear in contact activity feed via GET /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/events.

review_page.status: PASS - loads, tracking wired for platform clicks and feedback submission
